version_description: Corrected, timed chords and lyrics, relabeled sections, performance notes and related counting, suggested strum patterns.

versions.version_description: Debarge - Rhythm Of The Night - - Link https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cAQSZhazYk8.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
ORDER: I V1 PC1 C1 INT V2 PC2 C2 M8 FPC FC FPsC O


[INTRO]
(drums on e of 3 - each beat divided into # e + a)
n.c. |

[ch]D[/ch] | | | |

1 + 2 + 3 + 4 +     1 + 2 + 3 + 4 +
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]C/D[/ch] | [ch]C/D[/ch]     [ch]C/D[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch]  |
1 + 2 + 3 + 4 +     1 + 2 + 3 + 4 +[/tab]
[ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]C/D[/ch] | [ch]C/D[/ch]     [ch]C/D[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch]  |


[VERSE 1]
[tab][ch]Dadd9[/ch]                   [ch]Cadd9/D[/ch]               [ch]G/D[/ch]
      When it feels like       the world is on   your shoulders[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dadd9[/ch]                       [ch]Cadd9/D[/ch]            [ch]G/D[/ch]
      And all of the madness       has got you go - ing crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dadd9[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]            [ch]G/A[/ch]
      It's time to get out,     step out into  the street[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dadd9[/ch]                        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]               [ch]G/A[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
      Where all of the action     is right there at your feet[/tab]


[PRE-CHORUS 1]
[tab]     [ch]Csus2[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Bm7/A[/ch]
     Well,     I know a place where we can dance the whole night away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]A13[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
     underneath electric stars[/tab]
[tab][ch]A/C#[/ch]                              [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]Bm7/A[/ch]
     Just come with me and we can shake your blues right away,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                               [ch]A[/ch]
     you'll be doing fine when the music starts, oh[/tab]


[CHORUS 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
   To the beat of the rhythm of     the night, dance until the morning light[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
   Forget about the worries on your mind, you can leave them all behind[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
   To the beat of the rhythm of     the night[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Gadd9[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
   Oh, the rhythm of the night,      oh yeah[/tab]


[INTERLUDE]
1 + 2 + 3 + 4 +     1 + 2 + 3 + 4 +
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]C/D[/ch] | [ch]C/D[/ch]     [ch]C/D[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch]  |
1 + 2 + 3 + 4 +     1 + 2 + 3 + 4 +[/tab]
[ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]C/D[/ch] | [ch]C/D[/ch]     [ch]C/D[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch]  |


[VERSE 2]
[tab][ch]Dadd9[/ch]                            [ch]Cadd9/D[/ch]                [ch]G/D[/ch]
      Look out on the street now,       the party's just   beginning[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dadd9[/ch]                     [ch]Cadd9/D[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]
      The music's playing,       a celebra - tion's starting[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dadd9[/ch]                         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]               [ch]G/A[/ch]
      Under the street lights,     the scene is be - ing set[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dadd9[/ch]                     [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                 [ch]G/A[/ch]
      A night for romance,     a night you won't   forget[/tab]


[PRE-CHORUS 2]
[tab]        [ch]A/C#[/ch]                                 [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7/A[/ch]
     So,    come join the fun, this ain't no time to be staying home,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                [ch]A13[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
     whoo, there's too much going on,      oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]A/C#[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7/A[/ch]
     Tonight is gonna be a night like you've never known[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                        [ch]A[/ch]
     We're gonna have a good time the whole night long, oh![/tab]


[CHORUS 2]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
   To the beat of the rhythm of     the night, dance until the morning light[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
   Forget about the worries on your mind, you can leave them all behind[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
   To the beat of the rhythm of     the night[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Gadd9[/ch]  [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
   Oh, the rhythm of the night,      oh    yeah[/tab]


[MIDDLE 8]
[ch]Bm7[/ch] | [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]A/B[/ch] | [ch]G/A[/ch] | [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]G/A[/ch] |
[ch]Bm7[/ch] | [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]A/B[/ch] | [ch]G/A[/ch] | [ch]G/A[/ch]  [ch]G/A[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] |


[FINAL PRE-CHORUS]
[tab][ch]A/C#[/ch]                                  [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7/A[/ch]
     come join the fun, this ain't no time to be staying home,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                [ch]A13[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
     whoo, there's too much going on,      oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]A/C#[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7/A[/ch]
     Tonight is gonna be a night like you've never known[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gmaj7[/ch]                                        [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]A/B[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
     We're gonna have a good time the whole night long,    oh![/tab]


[FINAL CHORUS]
(drums/synth/vox only beginning)
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                          [ch]B[/ch]
    To the beat of the rhythm of the night, dance until the morning light[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]                 [ch]B[/ch]
    Forget about the worries on your mind, you can leave them all behind[/tab]

(build - fuller drums)
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]Amaj7[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]
    To the beat of the rhythm of     the night, dance until the morning light[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]                  [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
    Forget about the worries on your mind,      oh...[/tab]

(full band)
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]Amaj7[/ch]                    [ch]B[/ch]
    To the beat of the rhythm of     the night (oh... ba - by, I'm cry -[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]                 [ch]B[/ch]
    Forget about the worries on your mind[/tab]
    -in')
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]Amaj7[/ch]                    [ch]B[/ch]
    To the beat of the rhythm of     the night (oh... ba - by, I'm cry -[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]                 [ch]B[/ch]
    Forget about the worries on your mind  (oooh...)[/tab]


[FINAL POST-CHORUS]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]G#m7[/ch]
Laaaa, laaa laaa  la              laaa    laaa[/tab]
                     (laa laa laa laa laa laa)
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]   [ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
Laaaa, laaa laaa  la[/tab]
               (laa   laa laa laa laa laa laa laa la l-laa)
[tab][ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]Amaj7[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]       [ch]G#m7[/ch]
Laaaa, laaa laaa      la              laaa    laaa[/tab]
               (The mu - sic's playing           it's a ce -

Laaaa,      laaa laaa      la[/tab]
- lebration)        (The mu - sic's playing, everybody dance


[OUTRO]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]
    To the beat of the rhythm of the night, ohhhh, ohhhh, ohhhh-oo-wohhh[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m7[/ch]                 [ch]F#m7[/ch]                 [ch]B[/ch]
    Forget about the worries on your mind, 'cause you can leave them all[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]
    To the beat of the rhythm of the night, dance until the morning light[/tab]
